metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=full driver=gap:keys — a mid-session /model switch persists to config.active_model and vibe rewrites meta.json.config on the next turn, so the sidecar re-read flips ModelName A->B (latest-wins); the /model picker is an arrow-key ModelPickerApp (not an inline slash), so the recipe needs keys, which the scaffolded driver stubs (route driver-gap).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — Vibe's interactive TUI exposes `/model` (`cli/commands.py`: `Command(aliases={"/model"}, handler="_show_model")`). `_show_model` opens an arrow-key `ModelPickerApp` over `config.models` (per meta.json the account has three: `mistral-medium-3.5`, `devstral-small`, `local`). Selecting an entry fires `on_model_picker_app_model_selected` → `VibeConfig.save_updates({"active_model": alias})` then `_reload_config()` — an in-place switch in the SAME session (no new session dir). So a genuine mid-session model change is supported.

**daemon=full** — The switch persists AND surfaces to the tailed transcript. Chain: `save_updates` writes `active_model` to the config layer → `_reload_config` does `base_config = VibeConfig.load()` (reads back the new model) → `agent_loop.reload_with_initial_messages(base_config=…)` sets `self._base_config` → the next turn's `SessionLogger.save_interaction(..., self._base_config, ...)` dumps `"config": base_config.model_dump()` into `meta.json` (session_logger.py:338), so `meta.json.config.active_model` = model B before turn 2's `turn_done`. The daemon's `readSidecar` (sidecar.go) re-decodes meta.json whenever mtime+size change and reads `config.active_model`; `parser.applySidecar` stamps `ev.ModelName = NormalizeModelName(st.model)` on EVERY event. MergeMetrics' latest-non-unknown-wins promotes `SessionMetrics.ModelName` to model B by t2_end. State topology holds: `/model` and the picker keystrokes are handled by the TUI command dispatcher and are NOT persisted to messages.jsonl (only LLM conversation messages are), so no user_message/turn events fire during the switch window — no working/waiting flicker (achieved structurally, not via a claudecode-style isLocalCommandContent filter). Tokens: sidecar `stats.context_tokens` → `turn_done` `TokenSnapshot.Total` (tokens_nonzero true, a context-window snapshot not a cumulative accumulator). Cost is never emitted (parser reads no cost field; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity) → cost_nonzero false.

**driver=gap:keys** — Model A (`mistral-medium-3.5`, the confirmed live launch default) is deterministic with no settings. The switch is an arrow-key picker: `slash /model` (elicited) opens it, then `keys Down` + `keys Enter` select+confirm. `keys` is a `not_implemented` stub in the scaffolded driver (`# TODO(mistral-vibe): tmux send-keys raw sequence`) → grammar gap. Additionally `wait_turn` (needed between turns) dispatches but is absent from `DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep"`, so the semantic lint also flags it. record ports SEAM 1 (keys/tmux send-keys) and adds `keys`+`wait_turn` to DRIVE_ELICITS before driving. NOTE — this contradicts the scaffold hint that `/model <id>` is an inline `slash` step: `_show_model(**kwargs)` ignores any argument and always opens the picker, so it is a `keys` gap, not an inline slash.

## Observations
model LEFT PROVISIONAL — final ModelName is model B, which depends on the picker's selection at record time; expected `devstral-small` (Down once from `mistral-medium-3.5`) but list order / highlight-start is unconfirmed, so record fills observations.model = model B from the recording. tokens_nonzero=true, cost_nonzero=false, agent=mistral-vibe.
caveats: driver has TWO gaps: keys (genuinely not_implemented — the picker's tmux send-keys seam) and wait_turn (dispatches but omitted from DRIVE_ELICITS, so the semantic lint flags it). record ports both before driving.
observations.model left provisional: final ModelName = model B is picker-selection-dependent (expected devstral-small on one Down, but list order unconfirmed) — record confirms and pins it.

PROVISIONAL on emission: whether a transient proc-<PID> presession row precedes the session_<...> birth is not source-confirmable — record settles it (spec anchors birth to start UNPINNED to be safe).
cost_nonzero=false: no cost field in the sidecar/transcript and mistral-vibe is absent from core/pkg/capacity.

sources.note: readSidecar re-decodes meta.json on mtime+size change and reads config.active_model — so a rewritten active_model surfaces on the next event
applySidecar stamps ev.ModelName = NormalizeModelName(st.model) on EVERY event; turn_done carries TokenSnapshot.Total from context_tokens
on_model_picker_app_model_selected → VibeConfig.save_updates({'active_model': alias}) + _reload_config(); _show_model opens ModelPickerApp (arrow-key picker, ignores inline args)
save_interaction dumps 'config': base_config.model_dump() into meta.json each turn — so config.active_model reflects the reloaded (switched) model before turn 2's turn_done
keys is not_implemented (TODO tmux send-keys); DRIVE_ELICITS='send slash sleep' excludes wait_turn — record ports keys + declares wait_turn
sibling: model A mistral-medium-3.5 confirmed from live config.active_model; single-birth anchoring + tokens_nonzero/cost_nonzero pattern
